Package jpg

Classes for parsing and manipulating JPEG-based files are found here.

See: Description

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    JpgDatePatcher
    A utility class providing the functionality to surgically patch dates in both the EXIF (TIFF) and XMP (XML) segments of JPEG files.
    JpgParser
    A parser for JPG image files that extracts metadata from the APP segments, handling multi-segment metadata, specifically for ICC and XMP data, in addition to the single-segment EXIF data.
    JpgParser.JpgSegmentData
    A simple immutable data carrier for the raw byte arrays of the different metadata segments found in a JPEG file.
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    JpgSegmentConstants
    This enumeration represents the known segment identifiers, that are often present in JPEG files.

Package jpg Description

Classes for parsing and manipulating JPEG-based files are found here.

Supports standard JPEG parsing, including metadata extraction and segment analysis.

Since:
July 2025
Author:
Trevor Maggs
